name: Self-Assured
desc: Gain a random stat up whenever you down a unit.

name: SelfAssured2
desc: Gain All Stats Up whenever you down a unit.

name: Luck Drain
desc: Gain +1 [img:lck] whenever a unit is downed.

name: LuckDrain2
desc:
Gain +1 [img:lck] whenever a unit is downed.
Gain an extra +2 [img:lck] whenever YOU down a unit.

name: Infested
desc: 50% chance to spawn a flea familiar when you end your turn.

name: Infested2
desc:
Spawn 2-3 fleas at the start of each battle.
50% chance to spawn a flea familiar when you end your turn.

name: Worms
desc: 50% chance to spawn a maggot familiar when you end your turn.

name: Worms2
desc: 50% chance to spawn a mutated maggot familiar when you end your turn.

name: Amped
desc: Gain +1 [img:spd] at the end of your turn.

name: Amped2
desc:
Gain +1 [img:spd] at the end of your turn.
You can move an extra time each turn.

name: Furious
desc:
Gain +1 Damage each time you land a critical hit.
+5% critical hit chance.

name: Furious2
desc:
Gain +1 Damage and +5% critical hit chance each time you land a critical hit.
+5% critical hit chance.

name: Deathless
desc: +3 Corpse HP

name: Metal Detector
desc: 5% chance to spawn a coin when you move over a tile.

name: MetalDetector2
desc: 10% chance to spawn a coin when you move over a tile.

name: Deathproof
desc: While downed, you have a 25% chance to revive with 1 HP at the end of each round.

name: Deathproof2
desc: While downed, you have a 33% chance to revive with 10 HP and All Stats Up at the end of each round.

name: Leader
desc: Adjacent allies have +1 Damage and +1 Range.

name: Leader2
desc: All allies have +1 Damage and +1 Range.

name: Mange
desc: Inflict Poison 1 on units that contact you.

name: Mange2
desc: Inflict 1 Poison, Bleed, Bruise, Weakness, and Leech on units that contact you.

name: E-Tank
desc: Start each battle with +20 unfilled max health.

name: ETank2
desc: Start each battle with +50 unfilled max health.

name: Careful
desc: Damage you deal to other allies is reduced to 0.

name: Careful2
desc:
Damage you deal to other allies is reduced to 0. You cannot inflict debuffs on other allies.
You are careful in many other ways too.

name: Dirty Claws
desc: Your physical attacks on Poisoned or Bleeding enemies inflict +1 Poison and/or Bleed.

name: DirtyClaws2
desc:
Your basic attack inflicts Poison 1 and Bleed 1. 
Your physical attacks on Poisoned or Bleeding enemies inflict +1 Poison and/or Bleed.

name: Late Bloomer
desc: On your 5th turn, you gain All Stats Up 3.

name: LateBloomer2
desc: On your 3rd turn, you gain All Stats Up 3.

name: Study
desc: Gain +1 [img:int] whenever you hit a new type of unit with an attack or ability.

name: Study2
desc: Gain +1 [img:int] whenever you hit a new type of unit with an attack or ability. All enemies of that type become Marked.

name: Skill Share
desc: Your other passive ability is shared with the other cats in your party at the start of each battle.

name: SkillShare2
desc: Your other passive ability is shared with the other cats in your party at the start of each battle. When breeding, your children will always inherit your other passive.

name: Natural Healing
desc: You have +1 Health Regeneration

name: NaturalHealing2
desc:
You have +2 Health Regeneration
Adjacent allies gain +1 Health Regeneration

name: Longshot
desc: +1 Range.

name: Longshot2
desc:
+2 Range.
Your ranged attacks have +25% critical hit chance.

name: Fast Footsies
desc: You are immune to negative tile effects.

name: FastFootsies2
desc:
You are immune to negative tile effects.
You can move through units and objects.

name: Slugger
desc: +1 Damage.

name: Slugger2
desc: +3 Damage.

name: Pulp
desc: When you kill a unit or destroy a corpse, it becomes meat.

name: Pulp2
desc:
+4 Damage.
When you kill a unit or destroy a corpse, it becomes meat.

name: Amplify
desc: +1 Magic Damage.

name: Amplify2
desc: +1 Magic Damage for every 3 [img:cha] you have.

name: Death Boon
desc: When you're downed, all allies gain All Stats Up.

name: DeathBoon2
desc: When you're downed, all allies gain All Stats Up 2.

name: Santa Sangre
desc: When you're downed, allies heal 12 HP. Excess healing is converted to Shield.

name: SantaSangre2
desc: When you're downed, allies heal 20 HP. Excess healing is converted to Shield.

name: Unscarred
desc: While at full hp you have 100% critical hit chance.

name: Unscarred2
desc: While at full hp you have 100% critical hit chance, +5 Mana Regeneration  and +1 All Stats Up.

name: Daunt
desc: Small enemies won't attack you.

name: Daunt2
desc:
Small enemies won't attack you.
Inflict Fear 1 on units that contact or attack you.

name: Animal Handler
desc: You start each battle with a random vermin familiar with boosted damage and health.

name: AnimalHandler2
desc: You start each battle with 3 random vermin familiars with boosted damage and health.

name: Whipcracker
desc: When you damage an ally they gain +1 Damage.

name: Whipcracker2
desc: When you damage an ally they gain +1 Damage and +1 [img:spd].

name: Might of the Meek
desc: Damage you deal that's 2 or less is always critical.

name: MightoftheMeek2
desc: Damage you deal that's 3 or less is always critical. +50% Crit Damage.

name: Gassy
desc: Whenever you take damage, knock back all adjacent units.

name: Gassy2
desc: Whenever you take damage, poison all adjacent units and knock them back 10 tiles.

name: Dealer
desc: You can use consumables on other units.

name: Dealer2
desc:
You can use consumables on other units.
Consumables you use have double the effect.

name: Patience
desc: If you end your turn without taking any actions, gain an extra turn at the end of the round. You don't regenerate mana on your main turn if you pass it.

name: Patience2
desc: If you end your turn without taking any actions, gain an extra turn at the end of the round.

name: Wiggly
desc: +25% dodge chance.

name: Wiggly2
desc: +25% dodge chance and +25% critical hit chance.

name: Mini-Me
desc: Gain a half-sized copy of yourself that has 50% of your stats. The copy is AI controlled.

name: MiniMe2
desc: Gain a half-sized copy of yourself that has 50% of your stats and quarter-sized copy that has 25% of your stats. The copies are AI controlled.

name: Bare Minimum
desc: Your stats can't go below 5.

name: BareMinimum2
desc: Your stats can't go below 7.

name: Unrestricted
desc: Actions with a once per battle restriction can be cast once per turn instead.

name: Unrestricted2
desc:
Actions with a once per battle restriction can be cast once per turn instead.
Actions with a once per turn restriction have a 50% chance to be castable again.

name: Death's Door
desc: While you're at 1 HP, your spells cost 1 mana, but can only be cast once per turn.

name: DeathsDoor2
desc: While you're at 5 or fewer HP, your spells cost 1 mana, but can only be cast once per turn.

name: Overconfident
desc: While at full HP, reduce the cost of your spells by 2, but take double damage. This can't reduce mana costs to less than 1.

name: Overconfident2
desc: While at full HP, reduce the cost of your spells by 2, but take double damage.  This can't reduce mana costs to less than 1. When you cast a spell, heal 1 HP.

name: Serial Killer
desc: After you kill 3 units, gain +6 [img:spd] and backstabs have 100% crit chance.

name: SerialKiller2
desc: After you kill 3 units, gain +6 [img:spd], backstabs have 100% crit chance, and gain an extra basic attack each turn.

name: Strength in Numbers
desc: Your familiars have +1 Damage for each other familiar you have.

name: StrengthinNumbers2
desc: You and your familiars have +1 Damage for each other familiar you have.

name: Fighter's Soul
desc: Fighter abilities are offered when you level up.

name: FightersSoul2
desc: Fighter abilities are offered when you level up.

name: Hunter's Soul
desc: Hunter abilities are offered when you level up.

name: HuntersSoul2
desc: Hunter abilities are offered when you level up.

name: Mage's Soul
desc: Mage abilities are offered when you level up.

name: MagesSoul2
desc: Mage abilities are offered when you level up.

name: Cleric's Soul
desc: Cleric abilities are offered when you level up.

name: ClericsSoul2
desc: Cleric abilities are offered when you level up.

name: Tank's Soul
desc: Tank abilities are offered when you level up.

name: TanksSoul2
desc: Tank abilities are offered when you level up.

name: Thief's Soul
desc: Thief abilities are offered when you level up.

name: ThiefsSoul2
desc: Thief abilities are offered when you level up.

name: Monk's Soul
desc: Monk abilities are offered when you level up.

name: MonksSoul2
desc: Monk abilities are offered when you level up.

name: Butcher's Soul
desc: Butcher abilities are offered when you level up.

name: ButchersSoul2
desc: Butcher abilities are offered when you level up.

name: Druid's Soul
desc: Druid abilities are offered when you level up.

name: DruidsSoul2
desc: Druid abilities are offered when you level up.

name: Tinkerer's Soul
desc: Tinkerer abilities are offered when you level up.

name: TinkerersSoul2
desc: Tinkerer abilities are offered when you level up.

name: Necromancer's Soul
desc: Necromancer abilities are offered when you level up.

name: NecromancersSoul2
desc: Necromancer abilities are offered when you level up.

name: Psychic's Soul
desc: Psychic abilities are offered when you level up.

name: PsychicsSoul2
desc: Psychic abilities are offered when you level up.

name: Charming
desc: You have a 25% chance to inflict Charm on units that damage you.

name: Charming2
desc: You have a 40% chance to inflict Charm on units that damage you.

name: First Impression
desc: Start each battle with +1 Bonus Attack.

name: FirstImpression2
desc: Start each battle with +2 Bonus Attacks and +2 Bonus Moves.

name: Scavenger
desc: If your trinket slot is empty, equip a small consumable food item at the start of each battle.

name: Scavenger2
desc: If your trinket slot is empty, equip a big consumable food item at the start of each battle.

name: Zenkai Boost
desc: If you end battle with 1 HP, gain +1 to a random stat permanently and start the next battle at full HP with All Stats Up 3.

name: ZenkaiBoost2
desc: If you end battle with 1 HP, gain +1 to 3 random stats permanently and start the next battle at full HP with All Stats Up 3.

name: Rockin'
desc: Spawn 4 small rocks at the start of each battle.

name: Rockin2
desc: Spawn 4 small rocks and 4 boulders at the start of each battle.

name: Mania
desc: 10% chance to restore all your mana at the start of your turn.

name: Mania2
desc: 25% chance to restore all your mana at the start of your turn.
When you use your basic attack, turn around and use it again.

When you use your basic attack, turn around and use it again.
Your basic attack inflicts Confusion 1.

name: Jester's Soul
desc:
Abilities from any class are offered when you level up.
You can reroll your level up options twice.

name: JestersSoul2
desc:
Abilities from any class are offered when you level up.
You can reroll your level up options twice.

name: Hot-Blooded
desc: Burn you inflict is increased by 1.

name: HotBlooded2
desc: Burn you inflict is increased by 2.

name: Toxic-Blooded
desc: Poison you inflict is increased by 1.

name: ToxicBlooded2
desc: Poison you inflict is increased by 2.

name: Blood-Blooded
desc: Bleed you inflict is increased by 1.

name: BloodBlooded2
desc: Bleed you inflict is increased by 2.

name: Void Soul
desc: Only upgraded Collarless abilities are offered when you level up

name: VoidSoul2
desc: Only upgraded Collarless abilities are offered when you level up. Collarless spells cost 1 less mana.
